name: remove_custom_timing_model
full_help:
remove_custom_timing_model

Description: 
removing Custom timing model

Syntax: 
remove_custom_timing_model  [-all] [-quiet] [-verbose] [<cells>]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-all]      remove all CTM cells
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<cells>]   cells to be deleted

Categories: 
Timing

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
